name: moirae-code
description: Moirae Code — A local-first, model-agnostic, governed coding environment

scripts.test:ananke:comparator: npm run verify:peers && npm run test:adrasteia
scripts.test:mnemosyne:comparator: npm run verify:peers && npm run test:adrasteia
scripts.test:horae:comparator: npm run verify:peers && npm run test:adrasteia
scripts.diagnostics:smoke: node apps/diagnostics-cli/dist/index.js inspect --json && node apps/diagnostics-cli/dist/index.js verify-adrasteia && node apps/diagnostics-cli/dist/index.js verify-peers
scripts.validate:full: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
scripts.validate: npm run validate:env && npm run verify:adrasteia && npm run verify:peers && npm run validate:full
